ask_prompt: My monthly revenue is {revenue}, net profit {netProfit}. Estimated tax set-aside is {setAside} ({pct}% of revenue). Am I setting aside enough? What tax optimizations are available for {smbLabel}s?
tip_pension_desc: Contributing to a {pension} reduces taxable income. Up to {pct}% of profits is typically deductible.
tip_capital_desc: Equipment, computers, and vehicles purchased for business use can reduce taxable profit through capital allowances.
tip_input_credits_desc: Ensure all business purchases have valid {name} receipts. Many SMBs miss 2-5% of claimable input {name}.
tip_opt_income_desc: With {margin}% net margin, standard income tax on profits may be lower than {rate}% turnover tax.
tip_timing_desc: Bringing forward planned purchases (stock, equipment, marketing) into the current period reduces this year’s tax bill.
